textPlain:
You see innovation in this space a lot in research. For example, Dalorex [1] or Azul [2] for operations on sparse matrices. Currently a more general version of Azul is being developed at MIT with support for arbitrary matrix/graph algorithms with reconfigurable logic.[1] https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10071089
[2] https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10764548
